original_text: Ngày xưa có một em bé mồ côi cha từ hồi còn nhỏ. Người mẹ sau một thời gian tang chế cũng đi lấy chồng. Vì bà con thân thích nội ngoại không còn ai nên nó phải theo mẹ về ở với bố ghẻ. Bố ghẻ tính rất vũ phu, coi cả hai mẹ con như kẻ ăn đứa ở. Nhất là thằng bé chưa biết làm gì cả, nên hắn lại càng ghét dữ. Nhiều lúc có việc trái ý, hắn đánh thằng bé thâm tím cả mình mẩy.
translated_text: Once upon a time, there was a young boy whose father had died when he was little. After a period of mourning, his mother remarried. Since there were no relatives left on either side of the family, the boy had to follow his mother to live with his stepfather. The stepfather was a very abusive man who treated both mother and son like servants. He especially hated the boy, who was still too young to do any work. Often, when something displeased him, he would beat the boy until his body was covered in bruises.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a thin young boy cowering in a dark corner of a thatched house, looking with fear at a harsh-looking stepfather holding a rattan cane, gloomy atmosphere, medium shot, highly detailed, masterpiece quality.
subject: Boy

original_text: Nhà hắn cũng không có gì. Hắn thường sinh nhai bằng cách lên rừng đốn củi. Người đàn bà vừa về với hắn được một ngày đã phải gánh củi của chồng đi bán ở chợ.
translated_text: The stepfather's family was also poor. He made a living by going into the forest to chop firewood. Just one day after moving in with him, the woman had to carry the firewood her husband had cut to sell at the market.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a poor woman carrying a heavy load of firewood on a shoulder pole walking to a village market, sweat on her face, rural landscape, early morning, highly detailed, 8k resolution.
subject: Mother

original_text: Không may, năm đó trời làm mất mùa. Miếng ăn kiếm rất chật vật. Củi rẻ như bèo. Trước kia một gánh củi nuôi sống gia đình được mấy ngày thì bây giờ không đủ nuôi được một bữa. Thằng bé chưa làm được nghề ngỗng gì cả, trở nên một cái gai trước mắt bố ghẻ.
translated_text: Unfortunately, that year the harvest failed. Earning a living became extremely difficult. Firewood was dirt cheap. Whereas before a load of firewood could support the family for several days, now it wasn't enough for even a single meal. The little boy, unable to do any work, became a thorn in his stepfather's side.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a barren rice field under a hot sun, the stepfather looking at the boy with angry eyes, the boy sitting idly looking hungry, symbol of famine, highly detailed, professional artwork.
subject: Stepfather

original_text: Người bố ghẻ than thở với vợ rằng thằng bé chỉ là một miệng ăn vô dụng, chỉ làm cho cuộc sống thêm khốn khó, rồi giục bà đem bán nó cho người khác.
translated_text: - 'This boy is just a useless mouth to feed. He only makes things harder for us.' He said this to his wife and urged her to sell the child to someone else.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the stepfather whispering aggressively to the mother at night by an oil lamp, pointing towards the sleeping boy, the mother looking distressed, shadow play, highly detailed, masterpiece quality.
subject: Stepfather

original_text: Nhưng người đàn bà nhất quyết không chịu. Thà là cả hai mẹ con cùng chết chứ bà không đời nào chịu lìa con.
translated_text: But the woman adamantly refused. She would rather they both die than ever be separated from her child.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the mother hugging the boy protectively, shaking her head firmly at the stepfather, tears in her eyes but expression resolute, interior scene, medium shot, highly detailed, 8k resolution.
subject: Mother

original_text: Người bố ghẻ bèn có ý định muốn giết chết con riêng của vợ. Mạng người lúc này nhỏ bằng cái tơ cái tóc. Huống chi đối với hắn, hắn chẳng coi ra gì. Nạn đói coi chừng đang kéo dài và ngày càng dữ dội. Một gánh củi lớn bây giờ không đổi nổi một bát gạo.
translated_text: The stepfather then decided he wanted to kill his stepson. At that time, human life was worth next to nothing. To him, especially, it meant nothing at all. The famine was dragging on and growing more severe. A large load of firewood could no longer be traded for even a single bowl of rice.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, close-up of the stepfather's face, dark and sinister expression, contemplating evil, background showing a withered landscape of famine, highly detailed, professional artwork.
subject: Stepfather

original_text: Hôm đó, chờ lúc vợ đi chợ sớm, hắn đưa thằng bé lên rừng. Hắn rủ: - Mày có muốn trèo ổi và bắt bướm không? Trên ấy thì tha hồ.
translated_text: That day, waiting until his wife had left early for the market, he took the boy into the forest. He tempted him, saying: 'Do you want to climb guava trees and catch butterflies? There are plenty of them up there.'
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the stepfather smiling falsely at the boy, pointing towards the forest, the innocent boy looking excited, early morning light, medium shot, highly detailed, masterpiece quality.
subject: Stepfather

original_text: Thằng bé nghe thế lấy làm thích, cố xin đi theo cho được. Cảnh rừng có nhiều cái lạ làm cho thằng bé lon ton chạy theo bố ghẻ không biết mệt.
translated_text: Hearing this, the boy was delighted and eagerly begged to go along. The many strange sights in the forest made the little boy trot tirelessly after his stepfather.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the small boy running happily along a forest path, chasing butterflies, the stepfather walking behind with a cold look, forest scenery, wide shot, highly detailed, 8k resolution.
subject: Boy

original_text: Người đàn ông đưa nó vào rừng sâu. Khi đến chỗ mấy cây ổi rừng, hắn bảo thằng bé: - Ổi đấy. Và có bát cơm đây. Chốc nữa tao lại tìm.
translated_text: The man led him deep into the forest. When they reached some wild guava trees, he told the boy: 'There are the guavas. And here is a bowl of rice. I'll be back for you in a bit.'
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, deep dense forest, the stepfather placing a bowl of rice on the ground near a wild guava tree, the boy looking at the fruit, ominous atmosphere, medium shot, highly detailed, professional artwork.
subject: Stepfather

original_text: Thế rồi hắn bỏ mặc thằng bé, lẳng lặng lui ra, đến một chỗ khác kiếm củi. Nhưng buổi chiều, khi bước chân vào nhà hắn lấy làm ngạc nhiên thấy thằng bé đã về trước hắn rồi.
translated_text: Then he abandoned the boy, silently withdrawing to go chop wood elsewhere. But that evening, when he stepped into his house, he was astonished to see that the boy had returned before him.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the stepfather walking into his yard in the evening, shocked to see the boy sitting on the porch, safe and sound, dramatic lighting, highly detailed, masterpiece quality.
subject: Stepfather

original_text: Số là thằng bé trong khi đang bơ vơ giữa rừng rậm thì may mắn gặp một bọn đi đào khoai mài về ngang. Thế là họ đưa nó về. Nhờ có bát cơm, nó vẫn đủ sức đi được đến nhà.
translated_text: As it happened, while the boy was lost in the dense forest, he had been lucky enough to meet a group of people returning from digging for wild yams. They brought him home. Thanks to the bowl of rice, he had enough strength to make the journey.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, a group of kind villagers finding the boy in the forest, one sharing food with him, warm and hopeful colors, medium shot, highly detailed, 8k resolution.
subject: Villagers

original_text: Nghe đứa bé kể, hắn bực mình vô hạn. Hắn vờ mắng: - Chỉ vì mày, làm tao tìm mãi không được!
translated_text: Hearing the boy's story, the stepfather was infinitely annoyed. He feigned anger, scolding: 'It's all your fault! I was looking for you everywhere and couldn't find you!'
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the stepfather yelling at the boy with feigned concern but hidden anger, the boy looking confused and apologetic, interior night scene, highly detailed, professional artwork.
subject: Stepfather

original_text: Một lần khác hắn lại dỗ được đứa bé đi theo lên rừng. Lần này hắn cố tâm đưa nó vào thật sâu, đến những nơi chưa ai dám tìm vào hái củi bao giờ. Khi trốn khỏi thằng bé, hắn nghĩ bụng: - 'Không chết vì thú dữ thì cũng chết vì lạc, không chết vì lạc thì cũng chết đói mà thôi'.
translated_text: Another time, he again coaxed the boy to follow him into the forest. This time, he deliberately took him much deeper, to places where no one ever dared to go for firewood. As he slipped away from the boy, he thought to himself: 'If he's not killed by wild beasts, he'll die from being lost. If he doesn't die from being lost, he'll surely die of hunger.'
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the stepfather leading the boy into a dark, scary, and overgrown part of the jungle, ancient trees, eerie atmosphere, wide shot, highly detailed, masterpiece quality.
subject: Stepfather

original_text: Mãi đến chiều tối vẫn không thấy bố ghẻ trở lại, thằng bé khóc lóc, kêu gào nhưng chỉ có tiếng vọng của núi rừng trả lời nó thôi. Nó cuống cuồng chạy tìm khắp mọi ngả nhưng không hề thấy một bóng người.
translated_text: When evening came and the stepfather still had not returned, the little boy cried and screamed, but only the echoes of the forest answered him. He ran frantically in every direction but saw no sign of anyone.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the small boy alone in the vast dark forest at twilight, crying and looking around in panic, sense of isolation, medium shot, highly detailed, 8k resolution.
subject: Boy

original_text: Khi đã mệt lử và đói bụng, nó tìm đến chỗ bát cơm của bố ghẻ để lại thì không ngờ đấy là một bát cát trên có rắc một lớp cơm với một quả cà để đánh lừa.
translated_text: Exhausted and hungry, he went to the spot where his stepfather had left the bowl of rice, only to discover that it was a bowl of sand with a thin layer of rice sprinkled on top and a single eggplant, all meant to deceive him.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, close-up of a bowl filled with sand, topped with a few rice grains and an eggplant, the boy's dirty hand reaching for it, tragic realization, highly detailed, professional artwork.
subject: Boy

original_text: Thằng bé nhặt những hạt cơm phủi cát bỏ vào miệng. Cuối cùng đói quá, nó cầm lấy bát chạy khắp nơi và kêu lên: - 'Bố ghẻ ơi! Bát cát quả cà! Bát cát quả cà!'. Nhưng tiếng kêu gào của nó chỉ làm cho một vài con chim rừng giật mình mà thôi.
translated_text: The boy picked out the grains of rice, brushed off the sand, and put them in his mouth. Finally, overwhelmed by hunger, he took the bowl and ran everywhere, crying out: 'Oh, stepfather! A bowl of sand, a single eggplant! A bowl of sand, a single eggplant!' ('Bố ghẻ ơi! Bát cát quả cà! Bát cát quả cà!'). But his cries only startled a few forest birds.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the starving boy running through the forest holding the bowl, mouth open screaming in despair, birds flying away, dramatic and sad, medium shot, highly detailed, masterpiece quality.
subject: Boy

original_text: Rồi thằng bé chết, hóa thành chim đa đa, luôn luôn kêu những tiếng 'Bát cát quả cà! Bát cát quả cà!'.
translated_text: Then the little boy died and transformed into the Đa Đa bird (the partridge), which forever cries out the words, 'A bowl of sand, a single eggplant! A bowl of sand, a single eggplant!'.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the boy collapsing on the forest floor, a Partridge bird (Da Da bird) rising from his body, mystical transformation, soft sad light, highly detailed, 8k resolution.
subject: Boy

original_text: Đợi mãi không thấy con về, người đàn bà khóc thương vô hạn. Đoán biết thằng chồng tàn bạo đã ám hại con mình, bà ta đứng lên xỉa xói vào mặt hắn.
translated_text: Waiting in vain for her son to return, the woman wept with infinite sorrow. Guessing that her cruel husband had harmed her child, she stood up and berated him to his face.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the mother confronting the stepfather at home, face full of grief and anger, pointing at him, the stepfather looking guilty, interior scene, highly detailed, professional artwork.
subject: Mother

original_text: Cuối cùng bà ta bắt hắn phải đi kiếm con mình về ngay, nếu không sẽ lên quan tố cáo. Túng thế hắn phải vào rừng.
translated_text: Finally, she demanded that he go find her son immediately, threatening to report him to the authorities if he didn't. Trapped, he had no choice but to go into the forest.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the mother pushing the stepfather out of the door, threatening him, the stepfather looking fearful, stormy weather outside, medium shot, highly detailed, masterpiece quality.
subject: Mother

original_text: Hắn tìm mãi. Đột nhiên trong khu rừng hẻo lánh nổi lên mấy tiếng 'Bát cát quả cà! Bát cát quả cà!'. Hắn rụng rời. Đích thị là oan hồn thằng bé đã lên tiếng vạch tội ác của hắn.
translated_text: He searched and searched. Suddenly, from the remote woods, came the cry, 'A bowl of sand, a single eggplant! A bowl of sand, a single eggplant!'. He was terrified. It was undoubtedly the boy's vengeful spirit, crying out to expose his crime.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the stepfather walking in the forest, looking terrified, hearing sounds from the trees, haunted atmosphere, close-up on fearful face, highly detailed, 8k resolution.
subject: Stepfather

original_text: Nghe luôn mấy tiếng liên tiếp, hắn không còn hồn vía nào nữa, vội bỏ chạy. Nhưng mấy tiếng 'Bát cát quả cà' đuổi theo hắn. Hắn chạy mãi, băng hết khu rừng nọ sang khu rừng kia. Tự nhiên hắn vấp phải đá ngã xuống bất tỉnh nhân sự.
translated_text: Hearing the cry several more times, he lost his nerve completely and fled. But the calls of 'A bowl of sand, a single eggplant' pursued him. He ran and ran, crossing from one forest to another. Suddenly, he tripped on a rock and fell unconscious.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, the stepfather running frantically through the woods, looking back in terror, tripping over a rock, dynamic motion blur, highly detailed, professional artwork.
subject: Stepfather

original_text: Mấy ngày sau, những người tiều phu thấy thi thể hắn nằm vật ở mé rừng.
translated_text: A few days later, woodcutters found his dead body lying at the edge of the forest.
prompt: Traditional Vietnamese painting style, woodcutters finding a body lying motionless near the edge of the forest, birds flying above, somber ending, landscape shot, highly detailed, masterpiece quality.
subject: Woodcutters
